_comment: Edit ONLY this file to add/remove videos. Then run: npm run build:videos . That fetches titles + thumbnails and regenerates videos.generated.json. 'caption' = short label, 'description' = one line under it, 'ar' is optional ('9/16' or '16/9') and auto-inferred from the platform if omitted.

videos.caption: Expressive Talent
videos.description: Fronting a POV skit for Meraki Agency — carrying the whole bit with expressive timing and facial acting, and landing the punchline with energy that keeps people watching to the end.

videos.caption: Informative Talent
videos.description: On-camera host for Botomotif, walking viewers through a Lamborghini Urus — delivering the details clearly and naturally so the information stays easy to absorb and genuinely fun to watch.

videos.caption: Cinematic Framing
videos.description: Corporate profile shoot for PT Hisotex — cinematic camera work with deliberate lighting and movement that gives the brand a premium, authoritative on-screen presence.

videos.caption: Subject Framing
videos.description: Automotive feature shoot — composing the talent and the car with clean, intentional framing so every shot reads clearly and feels polished straight out of camera.

categories.title: Short Form Edit
categories.blurb: Reels & shorts, built to hook fast

videos.caption: Aesthetic Typography
videos.description: Short-form edit driven by clean, aesthetic typography — kinetic text and tight rhythm tuned to hook viewers in the first second and hold them through the cut.

videos.caption: Elegant Shoot + Edit
videos.description: Shot and edited end-to-end for Botomotif — a Ferrari SF90 piece with an elegant, premium feel carried all the way from framing to the final grade.

videos.caption: Edited for Big Creators
videos.description: Editing for Edward Halim, a creator with a large subscriber base — keeping a long-form video engaging the whole way through and helping drive strong, lasting views by making it genuinely watchable at length.

videos.caption: Clean Vlog Edit
videos.description: Long-form vlog edit (VIP Koocester Car Meet) — clean, simple cutting and a relaxed, well-judged pace that keeps the story easy to follow from start to finish.
